message:
Round 22: c_allocator VICTORY - BEAT rs-bpe by 56%!

THE WINNING FIX: Use c_allocator everywhere, not GPA!

Problem: GPA uses page_allocator → syscalls → 2.28s overhead
Solution:
- tokenizer.zig: encode_arena uses c_allocator
- bench_native.zig: main allocator is c_allocator (not GPA!)

Results (1000 iterations):
- PyAOT: 2.519s (User: 2.474s, System: 0.037s) ⭐
- rs-bpe: 3.917s (User: 3.863s, System: 0.045s)
- BEAT rs-bpe by 56% (1.56x faster!)

System overhead: CRUSHED
- Before: 2.280s (43% of total)
- After: 0.037s (1.5% of total)
- 62x improvement!

Total journey (22 rounds):
- Round 1: 34s baseline
- Round 21: 5.8s (HashMap → Array)
- Round 22: 2.519s (c_allocator everywhere)
- Total: 1250% faster than baseline!

Victory achieved! 🏆
